positive: Minimalist forest guardian silhouette, a stylized, majestic bear standing upright among bioluminescent ferns and glowing mushrooms. The bear should have clean, flowing lines and strong, negative space. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical. Use a deep indigo, emerald green, and luminous cyan color palette, evoking a magical, nocturnal woodland scene. High contrast, clean vector art style, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean edges, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermarks, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, photorealistic, messy, gradients, deep shadows, messy background, realistic textures
